localizations.title: Secret Recipes of Yore
localizations.hint_2: You can slice the bread with the knife.
localizations.hint_7: You can mix the ingredients using the whisk.
localizations.hint_13: Place the tip of your fingers on the eggshells to form a number.
localizations.hint_20_first: You only need half a bottle of milk. How can you obtain the correct quantity?
localizations.hint_20: How much is half of a bottle of milk?
localizations.hint_30: Once the contest begins, the chef will wait for your dish.
localizations.hint_45: What is the other ingredient that you need to make the pancakes?
localizations.hint_57: Now that the dish is ready, you must present it to the chef.
localizations.hint_62: You will have to mix everything together before it forms lumps.
localizations.hint_70: At what temperature must you set the burner for the French toast?  For how long must the French toast be cooked?
localizations.hint_72: You must cook the French toast.
localizations.hint_77_first: The pattern on the plate can be useful.
localizations.hint_77: Place the French toast (81) on the plate (77).
localizations.hint_81_first: Place the napkin with the French toast on the plate. Do you notice anything?
localizations.hint_81: Place the French toast (81) on the plate (77).
localizations.hint_86_first: What if you soaked a slice of bread in a pancake mixture?
localizations.hint_86: For cooking the dish, find a middle ground between the two parts.  What temperature should you set the burner to?  How long should you cook it?
localizations.answer_hint_2: Slice the bread on card E, take the blue modifier +2 and add it to the knife (2).
localizations.answer_hint_13: By placing the tip of your finger on each eggshell, your fingers and the egg yolk form the number 29.
localizations.answer_hint_20: Divide the bottle of milk (20) by 2, and thus obtain half of a bottle of milk (10).
localizations.answer_hint_30: When your dish is ready, present it to the chef to get feedback.
localizations.answer_hint_45: You must add the flour. Use machine 25 that is on the shelf.
localizations.answer_hint_57: Present the dish to the chef (30) to get feedback.
localizations.answer_hint_62: Use the whisk (7) to mix the ingredients.
localizations.answer_hint_69: Set the temperature (70) to make the pancakes.
localizations.answer_hint_70: Set the burner temperature to 6 and place your device over card 72. You will see the bread turn golden - flip card 72 after 12 seconds. Then wait an extra 12 seconds to cook that side.
localizations.answer_hint_77: Slide the card with the golden French toast (81) onto the card with the decorative plate (77) so that the napkin is aligned with the decorations. This will form the number 57.
localizations.answer_hint_81: Slide the card with the golden French toast (81) onto the card with the decorative plate (77) so that the napkin is aligned with the decorations. This will form the number 57.
localizations.answer_hint_86: Start by cutting a slice of bread. Then add all the ingredients into the bowl, mix them, and soak the slice of bread in it.  Use the average values of both recipies to determine the temperature (5) and cooking time (11). Once cooked, put the food on the plate.
localizations.answer_hint_87: Grandma Teresa's advice: If you fail, try going up 1 notch.
localizations.hint_70_2: What temperature must the burner be set up to for the pancakes? How long must the pancake cook on each side?
localizations.answer_hint_70_2: Set the temperature to 4 and place your device over card 69. The pancake starts cooking. Flip the pancake by simulating the movement with your device after 10 seconds. Then let it cook on that side for the same amount of time.
localizations.answer_hint_87_2: Grandma Ginger's advice: If you fail, try going down 1 notch.
localizations.machine_25_bread: Flour is not needed to make French toast.
localizations.machine_86_text_1: But, Ginger, what is this nonsense you're saying? My recipe is the best! If you hadn't distracted them, I'm sure they would have won by now!
localizations.machine_86_text_2: What are you talking about? I only spoke up when the chef said YOUR recipe wasn't good enough. My pancakes have won many contests; YOU are the one who brought us bad luck!
localizations.machine_86_text_3: I'm sorry, Grandma Ginger and Grandma Teresa! I should try combining your recipies to get the best of both!
localizations.machine_86_instructions_1:
Create a new recipe from recipes 99 and 66.
Discard all other cards.
localizations.machine_86: How wonderful! I've never seen anything so beautiful nor eaten anything so scrumptious. Bravo! You just won our local cooking contest. I will enroll you in the regional contest at once! No, no, what am I saying? The national contest, of course! Ladies and Gentlemen, you should try this recipe at home as well! Let me know how it turns out!
localizations.machine_88: So, you forgot about your other granny, eh? You chose to use Grandma Teresa's recipe, but you know very well that French toast does not measure up to Grandma Ginger's excellent pancakes. Here's my recipe; learn it by heart just like you did before. If you need to read it again during the game, press the Penalty button once. Good luck!
